description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in dark brown shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal logs or timber planks, giving it a rustic appearance. The front facade features two large rectangular windows on the upper floor and two matching windows below, all framed in a warm wood tone. A covered porch with log supports extends from the side, providing a sheltered entryway. The cabin sits on a neatly manicured green lawn with a dark border, suggesting a landscaped yard. The overall design is symmetrical and traditional, with architectural details that evoke a classic log cabin style.
description: A two-story wooden log cabin with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered porch, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large windows on each floor and the main gable roof, with the lawn and base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered porch with log supports and a single upper window above the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with two large windows on each floor and the gable roof, but no porch visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing the full expanse of the roof and a long, windowless wall with log construction.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and dark shingle cladding, featuring a secondary gable over the porch area
attribute_window_arrangement: Symmetrical arrangement with two large rectangular windows on each of the front and rear facades, and a single window above the porch on the side; all windows are vertically aligned and evenly spaced.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the side beneath the covered porch, adjacent to the main structure.
